info.title: Bento-sandbox Order API
info.description: BentoWeb Order API using for manage order. Please ask our team for client_id and client_secret.

get.description: get order list of certain store

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: (1 Open Order, 2 Pending Verify Order, 3 Shipping Order, 4 Complete Order, 5 Cancel Order) // ถ้าไม่ส่ง action มา จะดึง All Order

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order by (ex. date_modified,desc หรือ date_created,desc)

parameters.name: is_cod
parameters.description: If is_cod 1 filter only Cash on delevery [COD] order

parameters.name: is_cod_complete
parameters.description: If is_cod_complete is 1 filter only Cash on delevery [COD] completed order, is_cod_complete is 0  filter only Cash on delevery [COD] uncomplete order

parameters.name: order_from
parameters.description: Order from [1 = Web, 2 = Mobile, 3 = FB, 4 = Android, 5 = iOS, 6 = Web POS, 8 = Mobile POS, 9 = Tablet POS, 10 = OpenAPI, 11 = FastCheckout, 12 = Lazada, 13 = Shopee Import, 14 = Lazada Import, 15 = CartBuilder, 16 = Shopee, 17 = Arislab Import, 18 = Deeple Import, 19 = Bentoweb Import, 20 = JD, 21 = LINE Shopping, 22 = TikTok Shop]

parameters.name: has_order_billing
parameters.description: filter by checking if an order billing (tax invoice) has been requested or not.

parameters.name: date_created_start
parameters.description: filter by date_created start (greater than and equal >=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: date_created_end
parameters.description: filter by date_created end (less than or equal <=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: date_modified_start
parameters.description: filter by date_modified start (greater than and equal >=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: date_modified_end
parameters.description: filter by date_modified end (less than or equal <=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: receipt_datetime_start
parameters.description: filter by receipt_datetime start (greater than and equal >=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: receipt_datetime_end
parameters.description: filter by receipt_datetime end (less than or equal <=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: shipping_date_start
parameters.description: filter by shipping_datetime start (greater than and equal >=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: shipping_date_end
parameters.description: filter by shipping_datetime end (less than or equal <=) YYYY-mm-dd HH:ii:ss ex. "2018-04-03 17:13:00"

parameters.name: order_tags
parameters.description: order tags id example 23 (single tag) or 23,58 (find multi order tags with OR condition)

- 11: บอกเลิกสัญญาบริการ
- 12: คืนเงินมัดจำบริการ
